ReplacementContent:
Contract Types

Two ways to compete.

Collateral offers two distinct contract primitives. Same verified metrics. Same locked capital. Same automatic settlement. Different opponents.

Solo Contract

Back yourself.

Stake capital against your own performance targets. Hit the metric — keep everything. Miss — the house takes a cut based on variance.

✓ Single operator
✓ Self-set threshold
✓ Pass / fail settlement
Rivalry Contract

Challenge an opponent.

Issue a head-to-head duel. Both operators lock matched capital. Verified growth determines the winner. Loser forfeits their stake.

✓ Two operators
✓ Matched capital
✓ Relative performance
Explore Rivalries →
